Class Board

java.lang.Object
org.atlanmod.risk.Board
public class Board extends Object
This class sets up the countries and continents on the org.atlanmod.risk.Risk game board.
Version:
Alpha
Author:
Ted Mader

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    checkAdjacency(String countryA, String countryB)
     
    List<Country>
    getAdjacencies(String countryName)
    Returns a list of the country objects that are the countries adjacent to the country specified by the string countryName on the board
    int
    getBonusArmies(String continentName)
    Returns the number of bonus armies awarded to a player for controlling all the countries in the continent whose name is the string continentName
    Continent
    getContinentByName(String continentName)
    Returns the continent object whose name is the string continentName
    List<Continent>
    getContinents()
    Returns a list containing the continent objects the board has
    List<Country>
    getCountries()
    Returns a list of all of the country objects in the board
    Country
    getCountryByName(String countryName)
    Returns the country object for the country specified by the string countryName
    List<Country>
    getMemberCountries(String continentName)
    Returns a list of the country objects that are in the continent specified by the string continentName
    int
    getNumberArmies(String countryName)
    Returns the number of armies currently in the country specified by the string countryName
    Player
    getOccupant(String countryName)
    Returns the player object that currently occupies the country specufied by string countryName
    List<Country>
    getUnoccupied()
     
    boolean
    loadBoard(String[] countriesArray, String[] adjacenciesFileArray, String[] continentsFileArray)
    Loads the information needed to construct the board and constructs the country and continent objects needed for the board from three files.
    void
    setNumberArmies(String countryName, int numberArmies)
    Sets the number of armies currently in the country specified by the string countryName to the integer supplied as an argument
    void
    setOccupant(String countryName, Player occupant)
    Sets the occupant of the country object specified by the string countryName to be the player object supplied as an argument.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Board

      public Board()

  • Method Details

    • loadBoard

      public boolean loadBoard(String[] countriesArray, String[] adjacenciesFileArray, String[] continentsFileArray)
      Loads the information needed to construct the board and constructs the country and continent objects needed for the board from three files. The first file lists all the countries. The second file lists all of the continents and which countries are on a given continent. The third file lists the adjacencies for each country.

    • getContinents

      public List<Continent> getContinents()
      Returns a list containing the continent objects the board has

    • getContinentByName

      public Continent getContinentByName(String continentName)
      Returns the continent object whose name is the string continentName

    • getBonusArmies

      public int getBonusArmies(String continentName)
      Returns the number of bonus armies awarded to a player for controlling all the countries in the continent whose name is the string continentName

    • getMemberCountries

      public List<Country> getMemberCountries(String continentName)
      Returns a list of the country objects that are in the continent specified by the string continentName

    • getCountries

      public List<Country> getCountries()
      Returns a list of all of the country objects in the board

    • getCountryByName

      public Country getCountryByName(String countryName)
      Returns the country object for the country specified by the string countryName

    • setOccupant

      public void setOccupant(String countryName, Player occupant)
      Sets the occupant of the country object specified by the string countryName to be the player object supplied as an argument.

    • getOccupant

      public Player getOccupant(String countryName)
      Returns the player object that currently occupies the country specufied by string countryName

    • setNumberArmies

      public void setNumberArmies(String countryName, int numberArmies)
      Sets the number of armies currently in the country specified by the string countryName to the integer supplied as an argument

    • getNumberArmies

      public int getNumberArmies(String countryName)
      Returns the number of armies currently in the country specified by the string countryName

    • getAdjacencies

      public List<Country> getAdjacencies(String countryName)
      Returns a list of the country objects that are the countries adjacent to the country specified by the string countryName on the board

    • getUnoccupied

      public List<Country> getUnoccupied()

    • checkAdjacency

      public boolean checkAdjacency(String countryA, String countryB)
